free_text: The charged reaction products were momentum
analysed in a broad-range magnetic spectrograph and
Self-supporting targets of 45Sc were prepared by an
evaporation technique from scandium metal. The target
thicknesses were estimated (to within+-25%) to be
120 mu-g/cm2 by a differential weighing procedure.
The estimated uncertainty in excitation energy is 12
keV for levels 1 through 11, 15 keV for levels 12
through 30 and 20 keV for levels 31 through 50.
